meta.title: Joseph Moreno | Product Developer Portfolio
meta.description: Portfolio of Joseph Alexis Moreno Inca, Product Developer focused on quality, UX, and automation.

hero.lead: I develop and validate digital products with technical judgment: fixing critical bugs, improving UX, keeping multilingual consistency, and automating data-driven workflows.

profile.title: Product Developer with a quality, UX, and business mindset.
profile.whatText: I work on real product flows: reproducing issues, identifying likely root causes, prioritizing by impact, documenting evidence, and supporting fixes through validation.
profile.howText: I focus on clarity, follow-up, and effective communication. A strong technical report reduces ambiguity, speeds up fixes, and helps the team make decisions.
profile.nowText: At Acelera, I apply Product Development judgment to a B2B platform for strategy, OKRs, KPIs, and backlogs, caring for stability, usability, and internationalization.

experience.title: Experience connecting product, quality, and continuous improvement.
experience.aceleraText: I develop, validate, and improve a strategic execution platform that connects planning, OKRs, KPIs, and backlogs. I have validated more than 150 bugs and resolved or managed hypercritical, critical, and non-critical issues, including failures that triggered full page reloads, multilingual inconsistencies, and UX friction.
experience.tribuRole: Digital Operations and Web Development Assistant · TribuCalma
experience.tribuTextOne: Technical diagnosis, metrics analysis, UX improvements, and flow optimization to increase site stability and retention. I supported web issue detection, user-behavior review, and prioritization of navigation, content, and digital-experience improvements.
experience.tribuTextTwo: I also researched internal automation opportunities and technology improvements to reduce manual work, organize operational processes, and make digital performance easier to measure.
experience.mentorRole: Junior Mentor · Universidad Científica del Sur
experience.mentorTextOne: Academic mentoring in mathematics for first-cycle students, strengthening fundamentals, problem solving, and study habits. I prepared support material, explained procedures step by step, and adapted communication to each student's level.
experience.mentorTextTwo: This experience strengthened my ability to organize complex ideas, communicate precisely, and follow up on other people's progress.

projects.title: Automations and products designed to make operations better.
projects.botTextOne: A serverless automation that checks public sources, detects new course cards, opens course details, obtains the final Udemy link with the coupon applied, and publishes opportunities to Telegram.
projects.botTextTwo: It has released more than 7,500 courses that are usually paid and, through coupons, reach a 100% discount so the community can claim and keep them in their accounts.
projects.botTextThree: It controls duplicates with persistent state: it avoids resending courses already published, but allows reposting when a new coupon code appears for the same course.
projects.deliveryTitle: Shipment management app for a small business
projects.deliveryTextOne: Application to manage shipments and support operational package tracking. It includes separate user and administrator profiles, allowing shipment states to be created, queried, and updated.
projects.deliveryTextTwo: The flow helps a small business organize logistics, centralize information, and provide clearer tracking for the final customer.

studies.title: Academic foundation reinforced with applied analytics.
studies.degreeTitle: Business and Systems Engineering · Universidad Científica del Sur
studies.degreeText: Training focused on systems, processes, business, and technology. Recognized in the top 10% for academic performance.
studies.ciscoTitle: Data Analytics Essentials · Cisco Networking Academy
studies.ciscoText: Certification focused on data analysis, ETL, SQL, and foundations for automation and reporting.

playbook.title: How I turn bugs, data, and AI into actionable improvements.
playbook.stepOneText: I gather context, steps, environment, severity, visual evidence, and expected behavior to reduce ambiguity before proposing a fix.
playbook.stepTwoText: I use Codex and Claude to accelerate analysis, refactor, generate hypotheses, review edge cases, and build solutions without losing my own technical judgment.
playbook.stepThreeText: I prioritize critical flows, regression, UI states, language variants, and sensitive data to ensure improvements actually reach the user.
playbook.stepFourText: I turn findings into checklists, reusable prompts, acceptance criteria, and technical notes so the team moves with less friction.

skills.title: Tools to develop, validate, measure, and automate.

languages.title: Adaptable communication for bilingual teams and users.
languages.spanishText: Clear communication for documentation, technical reports, bug follow-up, and product coordination.
languages.englishText: Training at UCSUR Language Center with Cambridge methodology. Technical reading and functional communication in digital contexts.
languages.siteText: The portfolio automatically detects the browser language and loads ES or EN from a key-based dictionary prepared for future languages.

contact.title: Shall we build something that works better?
contact.text: I am open to collaborating on product, QA, automation, and applied analytics, especially where quality directly impacts the user experience.
